title: Peppery Ukrainian Red-Curry-Paste Flatbread
description: A post-workout Ukrainian flatbread featuring red-curry-paste, perfect for satisfying your cravings after a tough workout. This flatbread is made with double-rise dough and is diabetic-friendly due to its balanced ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt. Mix well until combined.
Add warm water and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and sprinkle with red-curry paste and black pepper.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the flatbread is cooked through.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Brush with unsalted butter and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Cut into wedges and serve warm.
